title: Cars24 Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Cars24 Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24 Holdings Services:
Cars24 Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 Holdings Services!
